allow: Bash(python -c "from uuid import NAMESPACE_DNS; print\('NAMESPACE_DNS imported successfully'\)")

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import json

# 读取Notebook
with open\('LST_Tools_Master.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

print\("🔍 查找剩余的MODIS/006..."\)

for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    if 'MODIS/006/' in source:
        print\(f"\\n单元格 {i}:"\)
        print\(f"类型: {cell['cell_type']}"\)
        print\("内容预览:"\)
        # 显示包含MODIS/006的行
        for line_num, line in enumerate\(source.split\('\\n'\)\):
            if 'MODIS/006/' in line:
                print\(f"  行{line_num}: {line.strip\(\)}"\)
        
        # 检查是否在快速参考表格中
        if 'MODIS/006/MOD11A2' in source:
            print\("\\n这是在快速参考表格中，需要更新"\)
            new_source = source.replace\('MODIS/006/MOD11A2', 'MODIS/061/MOD11A2'\)
            new_source = new_source.replace\('MODIS/006/MOD13Q1', 'MODIS/061/MOD13Q1'\)
            new_source = new_source.replace\('MODIS/006/MCD43A3', 'MODIS/061/MCD43A3'\)
            cell['source'] = new_source.split\('\\n'\)
            print\(f"✅ 单元格 {i}: 已更新表格中的数据集版本"\)

# 保存更新
with open\('LST_Tools_Master.ipynb', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(nb, f, indent=1, ensure_ascii=False\)

# 最终验证
print\("\\n🔍 最终验证..."\)
with open\('LST_Tools_Master.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb_verify = json.load\(f\)

modis_061_count = sum\(1 for cell in nb_verify['cells'] if 'MODIS/061/' in ''.join\(cell['source']\)\)
modis_006_count = sum\(1 for cell in nb_verify['cells'] if 'MODIS/006/' in ''.join\(cell['source']\)\)

print\(f"\\n📊 最终验证:"\)
print\(f"  MODIS/061/: {modis_061_count} 处 ✅"\)
print\(f"  MODIS/006/: {modis_006_count} 处"\)

if modis_006_count == 0:
    print\("\\n✅ 所有MODIS版本已成功更新到061！"\)
else:
    print\("\\n⚠️  仍有MODIS/006未更新"\)

EOF)
